metadata.description: Agent skills for CFO tasks — pricing, expense tracking, invoicing & billing, forecasting, and reporting — built to run against Economico's MCP ledger

plugins.name: setup-economico
plugins.description: Connect and authenticate Economico (the agent-native ledger the other cfo-skills run against) via MCP or the @economico/cli, including unattended confidential clients

plugins.name: company-setup
plugins.description: Guided first-run setup once Economico is connected: fill the legal-entity profile, register named bank/wallet accounts, and stand up the cap table (share classes, founder issuance, early SAFEs), then hand off to pricing, creating-contracts, and expense-tracking for the rest.

plugins.name: payment-rails
plugins.description: Model how money moves in and out of a business in Economico and pick the cheapest or fastest route. Register the identifiers that reach each account (RFC 8905 payto, CAIP-10) with priced in/out methods, account-level card/Flow collection, and counterparty payment instructions; rank routes with quote_payment_routes; post route fees to the ledger.

plugins.name: financial-analyst
plugins.description: Read Economico's ledger and turn it into financial analysis — reports plus ratios, trends, aging, concentration, burn, and runway, drilling into the journal when the reports don't say enough. Read-only.

plugins.name: expense-tracking
plugins.description: Ramp-style accounts payable: find vendor receipts/invoices in connected email and record them as bills, first building each vendor's party → contract → obligation spine so every line maps to the right chart-of-accounts code and feeds unit economics.

plugins.name: pricing
plugins.description: Create a customer-facing pricing.md and map the model into Economico contracts, obligations, revenue accounts, and platform-fee previews.

plugins.name: creating-contracts
plugins.description: Create order forms, choose standard terms, and set up customer contracts plus billable obligations before invoicing.

plugins.name: invoicing
plugins.description: Create, send, void, and reconcile customer invoices, preferring active contracts and obligation-linked invoice lines.

plugins.name: investor-reporting
plugins.description: Produce read-only investor updates and board metrics from Economico: MRR, ARR, ACV, NDR, burn, runway, default-alive, margin, concentration, and model KPIs.

plugins.name: cpa
plugins.description: Audit Economico's books for correctness and US GAAP conformance — tie out the statements and surface misstatements, misclassifications, missing accruals, and control gaps as ranked findings with evidence and the correcting entry. Read-only.

plugins.name: forecasting
plugins.description: Project Economico's future state — cash, runway, MRR/ARR, and committed inflows/outflows — by running what-ifs and forward-dated draft entries inside disposable planning scenarios, so reports show base + scenario and the real ledger stays untouched.
